description_long: This is a two-story kindergarten building with a red brick exterior and large, white-framed windows. The front facade features a central arched entrance with a glass door, flanked by symmetrical windows and a decorative curved wall. The interior is divided into multiple rooms, including a classroom with desks and a play area, all visible through the open roof. The front yard is landscaped with green grass, two blue pedestrian bridges crossing over small artificial streams or ponds, and decorative rocks and plants. Outdoor seating and pathways are present, enhancing the welcoming and playful environment. The overall design combines functional educational spaces with inviting outdoor play and relaxation areas.
description: A red brick kindergarten with large windows, arched entrance, and landscaped front yard featuring blue bridges, ponds, and play areas.
description_view_0: Side view showing the building's brick wall, interior classroom, and part of the landscaped yard with bridges and water features.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the arched entrance, symmetrical windows, two blue bridges, ponds, and the main pathway leading to the door.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the building's brick wall, interior rooms, and the continuation of the landscaped yard with bridges and water features.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back brick wall, large window, and interior layout with visible classroom and play areas.
attribute_architectural_style: storybook with modern elements; features include curved facade, arched entrance, and large windows
